description: Principal Interaction Action Type - Add a 7-question binary checklist as the 4th required action type for PM school visits. IMPORTANT: Before starting any story, read these two files for full context: (1) `docs/ai/project-context.md` — project architecture, patterns, and conventions; (2) `docs/ai/principal-interaction/2026-03-10-principal-interaction-implementation-plan.md` — detailed implementation plan with exact file paths, line numbers, and code-level instructions for every change.

userStories.title: Config, validation library, and unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a configuration and validation module for Principal Interaction so the API and form can validate question data consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/lib/principal-interaction.ts` following `src/lib/af-team-interaction.ts` pattern (no `teachers` array)

Export `PRINCIPAL_INTERACTION_CONFIG` with exactly 5 sections and 7 questions: oh_program_feedback (Operational Health), ip_curriculum_progress + ip_key_events (Implementation Progress), sp_student_performance (Student Performance on Monthly Tests), sn_concerns_raised (Support Needed), mp_monthly_plan + mp_permissions_obtained (Monthly Planning)
Export `PrincipalInteractionData` interface: `{ questions: Record<string, { answer: boolean | null; remark?: string }> }`

Export `validatePrincipalInteractionSave()` (lenient): returns `{ valid: true }` for partial/empty data, `{ valid: false, errors }` for unknown top-level keys. `ALLOWED_TOP_LEVEL_KEYS = new Set(["questions"])`

Export `validatePrincipalInteractionComplete()` (strict): returns `{ valid: false, errors }` when any of the 7 questions is unanswered or has null answer, with human-readable error messages including question labels

Create `src/lib/principal-interaction.test.ts` following `src/lib/af-team-interaction.test.ts` pattern with ~20 tests: config integrity (5 sections, 7 unique keys, allQuestionKeys), lenient validation (empty OK, partial OK, unknown question keys ignored, unknown top-level keys rejected, type checks), strict validation (all 7 required, null rejected, labels in errors, fully complete accepted)
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)
userStories.notes: Question text must use the typo-corrected versions from the plan (e.g. 'Were you able to...' not 'Where you able to...'). Keys sp_student_performance and mp_monthly_plan intentionally overlap with AF Team/Individual Teacher — safe because each action stores data in its own JSONB row.

userStories.title: Update type registry (visit-actions)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to replace `principal_meeting` with `principal_interaction` in the action types registry so the system recognizes the new type.
acceptanceCriteria: In `src/lib/visit-actions.ts`: remove `principal_meeting: "Principal Meeting"` from `ACTION_TYPES`, add `principal_interaction: "Principal Interaction"` in its place (total stays at 10 types)
`ActionType` union includes `"principal_interaction"` — verified by TypeScript (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
In `src/lib/visit-actions.test.ts`: replace `principal_meeting: true` with `principal_interaction: true` in the exhaustiveness record
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)
TypeScript compiles (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
userStories.notes: This MUST land atomically with US-007 (ActionDetailForm) to avoid TypeScript errors from the exhaustive switch. If running independently, expect TS errors in ActionDetailForm until US-007 is done — that's OK for unit tests but tsc --noEmit will fail.

userStories.title: PATCH API route validation for principal interaction
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the PATCH action route to validate Principal Interaction data so invalid payloads are rejected on save.
acceptanceCriteria: In `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/actions/[actionId]/route.ts`: import `validatePrincipalInteractionSave` and `validatePrincipalInteractionComplete` from `@/lib/principal-interaction`

Add `principal_interaction` validation block after the individual teacher block: lenient for `in_progress`, strict for `completed`. Error message: `"Invalid principal interaction data"` with validation errors array
PATCH with `in_progress` + partial principal interaction data returns 200
PATCH with `in_progress` + unknown top-level keys returns 422
PATCH with `completed` + incomplete data returns 422 with `"Invalid principal interaction data"`
PATCH with `completed` + complete data returns 200
In test file: change default `BASE_ACTION_ROW.action_type` from `principal_meeting` to `leadership_meeting`
Add `buildValidPrincipalInteractionData()` helper + ~4 new tests in `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/actions/[actionId]/route.test.ts`
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: END API route validation for principal interaction
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the END action route to validate Principal Interaction data strictly so only fully-answered forms can be completed.
acceptanceCriteria: In `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/actions/[actionId]/end/route.ts`: import `validatePrincipalInteractionComplete` from `@/lib/principal-interaction`
Add `principalInteractionValidationError()` function following the `afTeamValidationError()` pattern
Wire into both primary and concurrent-fallback validation chains. No 'all teachers recorded' check needed.
END with incomplete principal interaction data returns 422 with descriptive errors
END with all 7 questions answered (non-null boolean) returns 200
In test file: change `PENDING_ACTION.action_type` from `principal_meeting` to `leadership_meeting`
Add ~5 new tests in `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/actions/[actionId]/end/route.test.ts`
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)
userStories.notes: Error message pattern: `"Invalid principal interaction data"` with validation errors array — same pattern as afTeamValidationError.

userStories.title: COMPLETE visit API — 4th required type
userStories.description: As a developer, I need visit completion to require at least one completed Principal Interaction so PMs always record their principal meeting.
acceptanceCriteria: In `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/complete/route.ts`: add 4th sequential check after individual teacher — query for >= 1 completed `principal_interaction` action
Check order: in-progress -> classroom -> AF team -> individual teacher -> principal interaction -> UPDATE
Error message: `"At least one completed Principal Interaction is required to complete visit"` with detail `["No completed principal_interaction action found"]`
Visit completion fails with 422 when no completed `principal_interaction` exists
Visit completion succeeds when all 4 action types have completed instances

In `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/complete/route.test.ts`: update 3 happy-path tests with 7th `mockResolvedValueOnce` for principal_interaction check (`.mockResolvedValueOnce([{ id: 601 }])`) inserted after individual teacher mock, before UPDATE mock
IMPORTANT: After adding the 7th mock, UPDATE query moves from call index 5 to index 6. Update `mockQuery.mock.calls[5]` to `mockQuery.mock.calls[6]` in the first happy-path test
Rename test `"completes visit when all 3 action types have completed actions"` to `"...all 4 action types..."`
Add new test: `"returns 422 when principal_interaction is missing"` — 6 mocks (visit + in-progress + classroom + af_team + individual_teacher + empty []), expects 422
Tests that short-circuit earlier (AF team missing, individual teacher missing, invalid rubric) do NOT need changes
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)
userStories.notes: The mock chain ordering is critical. Each happy-path test has sequential mockResolvedValueOnce calls. The new principal_interaction mock must be inserted at the right position.

userStories.title: Principal Interaction form component and tests
userStories.description: As a PM, I want a form to answer the 7 Principal Interaction questions so I can record my observations from the principal meeting.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/components/visits/PrincipalInteractionForm.tsx` following `AFTeamInteractionForm.tsx` pattern but WITHOUT teacher section
Props: `data: PrincipalInteractionData`, `setData: (data: PrincipalInteractionData) => void`, `disabled: boolean` — NO `schoolCode` prop
Sticky progress summary at `top-12 z-10`: 'Answered: X/7' (below page-level sticky header)
5 sections rendered as bordered cards with section headers, each question has Yes/No radio buttons + optional remark text input
`data-testid="action-renderer-principal_interaction"` set on root element
No fetch calls, no loading state, no teacher dropdown — uses theme tokens from `src/lib/theme.ts`

Create `src/components/visits/PrincipalInteractionForm.test.tsx` with ~15 tests: rendering (5 sections, 7 questions, progress '0/7'), interactions (radio toggle, remark input, progress update), read-only mode (disabled radios + inputs), no teacher UI
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)
userStories.notes: This is the simplest form in the system. No async operations, no teacher fetching, no rubric scoring — just 7 binary questions with optional remarks.

userStories.title: Wire form into ActionDetailForm
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to integrate the Principal Interaction form into the action detail page so PMs can access it when viewing/editing a principal interaction action.
acceptanceCriteria: In `src/components/visits/ActionDetailForm.tsx`: remove `principal_meeting` from `ACTION_FORM_CONFIGS`, add `principal_interaction` with title 'Principal Interaction Details', description 'Record observations from the interaction with the school Principal.', fields: []
Add `PRINCIPAL_INTERACTION_ACTION_TYPE` constant and add `principal_interaction` to `SAVE_BEFORE_END_TYPES` set

Add `sanitizePrincipalInteractionPayload()` following `sanitizeAFTeamPayload` pattern minus teachers: returns `{ questions: {} }` if data isn't plain object, iterates 7 known keys extracting only answer (boolean|null) and remark (string)
Add `bootstrapPrincipalInteractionPayload()` — bootstrap shape `{ questions: {} }`, returns sanitized data if input is plain object
Add `principal_interaction` case in `normalizeFormDataForAction`, `sanitizePatchData`, and JSX dispatch (renders PrincipalInteractionForm)
In `src/app/visits/[id]/actions/[actionId]/page.test.tsx`: change default `makeAction()` from `action_type: "principal_meeting"` to `"leadership_meeting"`

Rewrite renderer test to verify `PrincipalInteractionForm` renders for `principal_interaction` actions. Update testid assertions: `"action-renderer-principal_meeting"` -> `"action-renderer-principal_interaction"`
TypeScript compiles (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: Action cards stats and picker modal
userStories.description: As a PM, I want to see progress stats on Principal Interaction action cards and be able to create new Principal Interaction actions from the picker.
acceptanceCriteria: In `src/components/visits/ActionPointList.tsx`: import `PRINCIPAL_INTERACTION_CONFIG`, add `getPrincipalInteractionStats()` returning answered/total (7), render stats on `principal_interaction` cards
In `src/components/visits/ActionTypePickerModal.tsx`: add `|| actionType === "principal_interaction"` to enabled check — 4 types now enabled

In `src/components/visits/ActionPointList.test.tsx`: change `makeAction()` default from `principal_meeting` to `leadership_meeting`, update 5 other `principal_meeting` refs to `leadership_meeting`, update 2 display-name assertions `"Principal Meeting"` -> `"Leadership Meeting"`, add ~3 new tests for principal_interaction stats
In `src/components/visits/ActionTypePickerModal.test.tsx`: update enabled count 3->4, disabled count 7->6, add test for `principal_interaction` selectable
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: Rename ripple — source text and unit test fixtures
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to rename all remaining `principal_meeting` references across source and unit test files to avoid confusion with the new `principal_interaction` type.
acceptanceCriteria: In `src/components/visits/NewVisitForm.tsx`: change `"Principal Meeting"` -> `"Principal Interaction"` in instructional text

In `src/components/visits/NewVisitForm.tsx`: fix completion text from `"Complete the visit after at least one Classroom Observation is completed and no action is in progress."` to `"Complete the visit after all required action types are completed and no action is in progress."`

In `src/components/visits/NewVisitForm.test.tsx`: update regex from `/Complete the visit after at least one Classroom Observation/i` to `/Complete the visit after all required action types are completed/i`
In `src/hooks/use-auto-save.test.ts`: change sample action type to `leadership_meeting`
In `src/app/visits/[id]/page.test.tsx`: change sample action type to `leadership_meeting` + update display-name assertion `"Principal Meeting"` -> `"Leadership Meeting"`
In `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/route.test.ts`: change sample action type to `leadership_meeting`
In `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/actions/route.test.ts`: find-and-replace all `principal_meeting` -> `leadership_meeting` (7 occurrences)
Verify: no source or test file contains the string `principal_meeting`
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)
TypeScript compiles (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
userStories.notes: Run `grep -r 'principal_meeting' src/ e2e/` after changes to verify zero remaining references.

userStories.title: E2E tests for principal interaction
userStories.description: As a developer, I need E2E tests updated so visit completion tests pass with the new 4th required action type and a new test verifies the principal interaction requirement.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `buildCompletePrincipalInteractionData()` to `e2e/helpers/db.ts` following existing pattern: returns `{ questions: { [key]: { answer: true } } }` for all 7 keys
Rename-only: `complete-blocked-without-rubric` test — rename `principal_meeting` to `leadership_meeting` + add `principal_interaction: completed` seed with valid data
Rename-only: `complete-blocked-when-any-action-in-progress` test — rename `principal_meeting` to `leadership_meeting`
Rename-only: `program-admin-read-only` test — rename `principal_meeting` to `leadership_meeting`

Completion fix: `moderate-gps-warning-visible` — rename existing `principal_meeting: pending` seed to `leadership_meeting: pending` (keep as GPS test action) + add new `principal_interaction: completed` seed
Completion fix: `admin-can-complete-other-pm-visit` — change `principal_meeting: completed` to `principal_interaction: completed` with `buildCompletePrincipalInteractionData()`
Completion fix: `complete-visit-success` — add `principal_interaction: completed` seed with valid data
Completion fix: `visit-completes-with-all-three-required-action-types` — add `principal_interaction: completed` seed + rename test to `...all-four-required-action-types`

New test: `visit-completion-requires-principal-interaction` — seed classroom+af_team+individual_teacher as completed, do NOT seed principal_interaction, click Complete Visit, assert error `"At least one completed Principal Interaction is required to complete visit"`
E2E tests pass (`npm run test:e2e`)
userStories.notes: For moderate-gps-warning-visible: the test captures actionId from the pending seed and POSTs to /start + /end — using a completed action would cause 409. Keep leadership_meeting:pending for GPS testing, add separate principal_interaction:completed for the completion requirement.

userStories.title: Documentation updates (CLAUDE.md + project-context.md)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need CLAUDE.md and project-context.md updated so future contributors and AI agents understand the new Principal Interaction type.
acceptanceCriteria: In `CLAUDE.md`: add 'PM Visits: Principal Interaction (v1)' section with payload shape, 7 questions across 5 sections, validation rules (lenient/strict), no teacher selection, config/form file references
In `CLAUDE.md`: update visit completion rule from 3 to 4 required types, add `principal_interaction` to the list
In `CLAUDE.md`: add new test files to inventory (`principal-interaction.test.ts`, `PrincipalInteractionForm.test.tsx`), remove `principal_meeting` references
In `docs/ai/project-context.md`: add Principal Interaction subsection under section 3.5 (PM Visits)
In `docs/ai/project-context.md`: update action type counts (3 enabled -> 4, 7 disabled -> 6), update picker/card/completion descriptions
In `docs/ai/project-context.md`: add `PrincipalInteractionForm.tsx` and `principal-interaction.ts` to component/helper lists
No remaining `principal_meeting` references in either documentation file

userStories.title: Review changes and document findings
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to review all changes made during this feature implementation to ensure nothing was missed and document the results.
acceptanceCriteria: Use explore agents to understand the current state of all modified and new files
Review git diff to see all changes made across the branch
Verify TypeScript compiles cleanly (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
Verify all unit tests pass (`npm run test`)
Verify no remaining `principal_meeting` references in source or test files (`grep -r 'principal_meeting' src/ e2e/` returns empty)
Create `ralph/principal-interaction-review.txt` with concise findings (under 50 lines): what was done, files changed, test counts, any concerns or recommendations
userStories.notes: E2E tests (`npm run test:e2e`) require a local Postgres DB with dump loaded — skip if not available, note in review file.
